methodology.note: Both baselines collected with identical mock stack: DLT TCP 3491, SSH mock HTTP 8081, SWUT mock HTTP 8082.
Startup metric = cold subprocess import of tpms_utility, 5 samples each.
Stage latency deltas fall within mock-endpoint noise floor (~15 ms). No regression from remediations.

remediated.note: two-pass mean from perf branch BASELINE.md
mean of Pass1=129.981 Pass2=120.796 from perf branch BASELINE.md
mean of Pass1=119.456 Pass2=114.710 from perf branch BASELINE.md
mean of Pass1=10.824 Pass2=10.562 from perf branch BASELINE.md; earlier collection session

remediation.description: Replaced full-file audit log rewrite with append mode + 5 MB rotation.
remediation.impact: Eliminates O(n) write amplification on long test sessions.

remediation.description: Bounded execution log widget to 2000 lines; trim every 100 appends.
remediation.impact: Prevents unbounded Tk Text widget memory growth.
Startup avg -724.036 ms (-77.84%). Root cause: CLR + one_dad.dll_helpers pulled in at module load time.

remediation.description: Deferred startup self-check via root.after(0, self._run_startup_self_checks).
remediation.impact: First Tk paint no longer blocked; perceived startup responsiveness improved.

conclusion.summary: All four remediations are low-risk and correct identified inefficiencies. The dominant improvement is startup latency (-77.84% avg), driven by lazy SWUT library import.
